Hero.subtitle: Godai Training
Hero.description: Helping climbers and rope access technicians build strength, resilience and longevity for the demands of the vertical world.
Hero.sub_description: Sports science meets climbing, rope access and the pursuit of mastery.

FiveElements.section_description: Godai Training is built around five essential qualities that every climber, rope access technician and adventurer must develop to perform at their highest level.

chi.title: EARTH
chi.subtitle: Foundation
chi.description: Without a solid foundation, nothing else can be built. Earth represents the strength, resilience and structural integrity required to support every movement at height.

sui.title: WATER
sui.subtitle: Adaptability
sui.description: The vertical world is unpredictable. Water represents mobility, coordination and the ability to adapt efficiently to changing environments.

ka.title: FIRE
ka.subtitle: Capacity
ka.description: Fire is the engine. It represents the endurance, energy and work capacity required for long days on rope and demanding adventures.

fu.title: WIND
fu.subtitle: Movement
fu.description: The best climbers and technicians do not waste energy. Wind represents efficiency, balance and fluid movement.

ku.title: VOID
ku.subtitle: Mastery
ku.description: Mastery is not strength. It is awareness, focus and the ability to make sound decisions under pressure.

MeetAlejandro.subtitle: Meet Alejandro
MeetAlejandro.meta_description: Sports & Recreation Professional • Climber • IRATA Technician • Coach

story.p1: I was born in Pereira, Colombia, surrounded by mountains, rivers and nature. Growing up among the Andes developed a deep connection with adventure and the outdoors that still shapes my life today.
story.p2: Since childhood I have been fascinated by movement. I climbed trees, explored rivers, spent countless hours outdoors, and discovered parkour at ten years old. Later I trained in athletics, constantly searching for new ways to understand and challenge the human body.
story.p3: As I grew older, my curiosity expanded beyond physical performance. Buddhism inspired me to become a better person, and years later Stoicism gave me practical tools to face adversity with purpose. Together they shaped a belief that still guides my work today.
story.quote: True performance is built through the balance of body, mind and spirit.
story.p4: That philosophy led me to pursue a degree in Sports and Recreation Sciences, where I began building a scientific understanding of human performance, training and long-term athletic development.
story.p5: During those years I discovered rope systems, rappelling and adventure sports. What started as curiosity gradually became a calling. Through technical training and field experience, I built the foundations that eventually led me into rope access and IRATA.
story.p6: Around the same time, a close friend introduced me to rock climbing. Since then, climbing has become one of the greatest teachers in my life. It continues to challenge me physically, mentally and emotionally, while constantly reminding me how much there is still to learn.
story.p7: Godai Training was born from that journey.
story.p8: Today my mission is to help climbers, rope access technicians and adventurers become stronger, move better, perform longer and develop the resilience required to thrive in the vertical world.

philosophy.subtitle: Philosophy
philosophy.title: The Three Pillars
philosophy.footer_quote: True performance is built through the balance of body, mind and spirit.

manifesto.subtitle: Godai Philosophy
manifesto.p1: I don't believe training is about chasing numbers.
manifesto.p2: I believe it is about becoming capable.
manifesto.p5: Capable of adapting when conditions change.
manifesto.p6: Capable of facing uncertainty with confidence.
manifesto.p7: Because strength alone is not enough.
manifesto.p8: The vertical world demands resilience, movement, awareness and mastery.

WhoIHelp.subtitle: Who I Help
WhoIHelp.description: Godai Training is designed for people who challenge themselves in environments where strength, resilience and adaptability truly matter.

climbers.title: Climbers
climbers.description: Develop strength, mobility and endurance for better performance on rock, plastic and alpine environments.

rope_access.title: Rope Access Technicians
rope_access.description: Build the physical capacity required for long days on rope while reducing fatigue and injury risk.

mountain.title: Mountain Athletes
mountain.description: Prepare your body for altitude, technical terrain and demanding outdoor objectives.

adventure.title: Adventurers
adventure.description: Become stronger, more resilient and capable for every challenge beyond the trail.

footer.subline: You only need the willingness to improve.

c1.title: Most people train for aesthetics
c1.description: They focus on appearance while ignoring the physical demands of their environment.

c2.title: Athletes train for performance
c2.description: They develop specific qualities to perform better in their sport.

c3.title: Vertical athletes need both
c3.description: Strength, endurance, mobility and resilience must work together when the consequences are real.

content.p1: Climbing, rope access and mountain environments place unique demands on the body.
content.p2: You need movement efficiency, work capacity, mobility, resilience and the ability to perform under fatigue.
content.p3: Godai Training combines sports science, climbing experience and rope access knowledge to prepare you for the realities of the vertical world.

TrainingPaths.subtitle: Choose Your Path
TrainingPaths.description: Whether you're building your foundation, pursuing performance or striving for mastery, there is a path designed for your stage of development.

foundation.name: FOUNDATION
foundation.tagline: Build the base that supports everything else.
foundation.description: The ideal starting point for athletes who want to stop improvising and start progressing with purpose.
foundation.whatsapp_message: Hi Alejandro! I want to start my training process with the Foundation plan. Can you give me more details?

performance.name: PERFORMANCE
performance.tagline: Strength, mobility and durability for life at height.
performance.description: The perfect balance between strength, mobility and resilience for climbers and rope access technicians.
performance.whatsapp_message: Hi Alejandro! I'm interested in the Performance plan to boost my physical capacities. How do we start?

mastery.name: MASTERY
mastery.description: The highest level of personalization with direct feedback, technique analysis and ongoing coaching.
mastery.whatsapp_message: Hi Alejandro! I want to take my training to the absolute maximum. I'm interested in the Mastery plan.

step1.title: Assessment
step1.description: We identify your goals, current level and physical limitations.

step2.title: Planning
step2.description: A personalized roadmap is built around your objectives.

step3.title: Training
step3.description: You follow a structured plan designed for progress.

step4.title: Adaptation
step4.description: The program evolves as your capacity improves.

step5.title: Mastery
step5.description: You become stronger, more resilient and capable in the vertical world.

TheGodaiApproach.subtitle: The Godai Approach
TheGodaiApproach.description: Godai combines sports science, climbing experience and rope access demands into a practical training system.

p1.title: Assessment
p1.description: Every athlete starts from a different point. Before building a plan, we identify your goals, strengths, limitations and environment.

p2.title: Adaptation
p2.description: The body changes through progressive stress. Training should evolve as your capacity evolves.

p3.title: Specificity
p3.description: Climbers and rope access technicians face unique physical demands. Your training should reflect that reality.

p4.title: Longevity
p4.description: Performance means little without durability. The goal is to stay capable, resilient and injury-resistant for years.

CurrentMission.subtitle: Current Mission
CurrentMission.description: I am still climbing, still learning, still training and still improving. The same process I use for myself is the process I use to help others.
CurrentMission.quote_line1: The pursuit of mastery has no finish line.

FreeAssessment.subtitle: Free Assessment
FreeAssessment.description: Let's talk about your goals, your current situation and the path that makes the most sense for you.

whatsapp.closing: I'd like to book a free assessment.
